summary: Comprehensive testing of Blog Ideation Tool - all features working correctly. Backend 15/15 tests passed. Frontend all critical flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~470 lines — acceptable but borderline; consider splitting repo parsing and RSS/ArXiv fetchers into separate modules if app grows
RSS cache uses (now - _rss_fetched_at).seconds which only works for differences < 3600 seconds within same day; use .total_seconds() instead for correctness across hour boundaries
parse_repo_sources() is sync and called via asyncio.to_thread() in /api/sources/all but called directly (sync) in /api/sources/repo — minor inconsistency, but not breaking
seed_data_creation: Test draft created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 test cases from review_request verified: dashboard loads with 48 sources (30 repo + 8 arxiv + 10 rss), type/tag filters work, ideate-from-this button navigates to Ideation Studio with pre-selected source, mode selection works, generate button disabled/enabled correctly, Claude AI generation works (ideas mode), save draft works, draft viewer modal opens, edit+save works, delete works, empty state shows after delete, sidebar navigation works. No issues found.
